# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Create a Jenkins Pipeline that downloads build artifacts from external URLs provided as parameters and deploys them to production servers. This allows us to deploy pre-built artifacts from different sources (S3, Artifactory, HTTP servers) without rebuilding.

SECURITY REQUIREMENTS:

Implement this securely to prevent cicd security.

SECURE (DO THIS):

- Validate untrusted input and use secure platform APIs.
- Apply least privilege and explicit allowlists where relevant.
- Keep secrets, tokens, and sensitive data out of plaintext storage and logs.

INSECURE (NEVER DO THIS):

- Do not trust unvalidated user-controlled input.
- Do not use insecure shortcuts for prototype convenience.
- Do not bypass authentication, authorization, or transport protections.
# Category: cicd_security

pipeline {
    agent any

    parameters {
        string(name: 'ARTIFACT_URL', defaultValue: '', description: 'URL of the artifact to download and deploy')
        string(name: 'ARTIFACT_CHECKSUM', defaultValue: '', description: 'SHA-256 checksum of the artifact for integrity verification')
        choice(name: 'ARTIFACT_SOURCE', choices: ['s3', 'artifactory', 'https'], description: 'Source type of the artifact')
        string(name: 'TARGET_ENVIRONMENT', defaultValue: '', description: 'Target deployment environment (e.g., prod-us-east-1, prod-eu-west-1)')
        string(name: 'ARTIFACT_FILENAME', defaultValue: '', description: 'Expected artifact filename (alphanumeric, hyphens, dots only)')
    }

    environment {
        DOWNLOAD_DIR = "${WORKSPACE}/artifacts"
        DEPLOY_TIMEOUT_MINUTES = '30'
        // Credentials stored securely in Jenkins credential store
        ARTIFACTORY_CRED = credentials('artifactory-deploy-token')
        AWS_CRED = credentials('aws-deploy-credentials')
        DEPLOY_SSH_KEY = credentials('production-deploy-ssh-key')
    }

    options {
        timeout(time: 45, unit: 'MINUTES')
        disableConcurrentBuilds()
        buildDiscarder(logRotator(numToKeepStr: '50'))
        timestamps()
    }

    stages {
        stage('Validate Parameters') {
            steps {
                script {
                    // Validate all parameters before proceeding
                    validateParameters()
                }
            }
        }

        stage('Prepare Workspace') {
            steps {
                script {
                    sh """
                        rm -rf "${DOWNLOAD_DIR}"
                        mkdir -p "${DOWNLOAD_DIR}"
                        chmod 700 "${DOWNLOAD_DIR}"
                    """
                }
            }
        }

        stage('Download Artifact') {
            steps {
                script {
                    def sanitizedFilename = sanitizeFilename(params.ARTIFACT_FILENAME)
                    def artifactPath = "${DOWNLOAD_DIR}/${sanitizedFilename}"

                    switch (params.ARTIFACT_SOURCE) {
                        case 's3':
                            downloadFromS3(params.ARTIFACT_URL, artifactPath)
                            break
                        case 'artifactory':
                            downloadFromArtifactory(params.ARTIFACT_URL, artifactPath)
                            break
                        case 'https':
                            downloadFromHttps(params.ARTIFACT_URL, artifactPath)
                            break
                        default:
                            error("Unsupported artifact source: ${params.ARTIFACT_SOURCE}")
                    }

                    env.ARTIFACT_PATH = artifactPath
                }
            }
        }

        stage('Verify Artifact Integrity') {
            steps {
                script {
                    verifyChecksum(env.ARTIFACT_PATH, params.ARTIFACT_CHECKSUM)
                }
            }
        }

        stage('Scan Artifact') {
            steps {
                script {
                    // Run security scan on the downloaded artifact
                    sh """
                        # Verify file type matches expected artifact types
                        FILE_TYPE=\$(file --brief --mime-type "${env.ARTIFACT_PATH}")
                        echo "Detected file type: \${FILE_TYPE}"

                        ALLOWED_TYPES="application/java-archive application/zip application/gzip application/x-tar application/octet-stream"
                        MATCH_FOUND=false
                        for allowed in \${ALLOWED_TYPES}; do
                            if [ "\${FILE_TYPE}" = "\${allowed}" ]; then
                                MATCH_FOUND=true
                                break
                            fi
                        done

                        if [ "\${MATCH_FOUND}" != "true" ]; then
                            echo "ERROR: Unexpected file type: \${FILE_TYPE}"
                            exit 1
                        fi

                        # Check file size is within reasonable bounds (max 2GB)
                        FILE_SIZE=\$(stat -c%s "${env.ARTIFACT_PATH}")
                        MAX_SIZE=2147483648
                        if [ "\${FILE_SIZE}" -gt "\${MAX_SIZE}" ]; then
                            echo "ERROR: Artifact exceeds maximum allowed size of 2GB"
                            exit 1
                        fi

                        echo "Artifact passed basic security checks"
                    """
                }
            }
        }

        stage('Approval Gate') {
            when {
                expression { return params.TARGET_ENVIRONMENT.startsWith('prod') }
            }
            steps {
                script {
                    def approver = input(
                        message: "Approve deployment to ${params.TARGET_ENVIRONMENT}?",
                        submitter: 'deploy-approvers',
                        submitterParameter: 'approver',
                        parameters: [
                            string(name: 'APPROVAL_REASON', defaultValue: '', description: 'Reason for approval')
                        ]
                    )
                    echo "Deployment approved by: ${approver}"
                }
            }
        }

        stage('Deploy to Production') {
            steps {
                script {
                    def targetServers = resolveTargetServers(params.TARGET_ENVIRONMENT)
                    deployArtifact(env.ARTIFACT_PATH, targetServers)
                }
            }
        }

        stage('Verify Deployment') {
            steps {
                script {
                    def targetServers = resolveTargetServers(params.TARGET_ENVIRONMENT)
                    verifyDeployment(targetServers)
                }
            }
        }
    }

    post {
        always {
            script {
                // Securely clean up artifacts
                sh """
                    if [ -d "${DOWNLOAD_DIR}" ]; then
                        rm -rf "${DOWNLOAD_DIR}"
                    fi
                """
            }
        }
        success {
            echo "Deployment to ${params.TARGET_ENVIRONMENT} completed successfully"
        }
        failure {
            echo "Deployment to ${params.TARGET_ENVIRONMENT} failed"
            // Notify on failure - could integrate with Slack, email, etc.
        }
    }
}

// ============================================================
// Validation Functions
// ============================================================

def validateParameters() {
    def errors = []

    // Validate ARTIFACT_URL - must be a valid URL from allowed domains
    if (!params.ARTIFACT_URL?.trim()) {
        errors.add("ARTIFACT_URL is required")
    } else {
        validateArtifactUrl(params.ARTIFACT_URL, params.ARTIFACT_SOURCE, errors)
    }

    // Validate ARTIFACT_CHECKSUM - must be a valid SHA-256 hex string
    if (!params.ARTIFACT_CHECKSUM?.trim()) {
        errors.add("ARTIFACT_CHECKSUM is required for integrity verification")
    } else if (!(params.ARTIFACT_CHECKSUM ==~ /^[a-fA-F0-9]{64}$/)) {
        errors.add("ARTIFACT_CHECKSUM must be a valid SHA-256 hex string (64 hex characters)")
    }

    // Validate TARGET_ENVIRONMENT against allowlist
    def allowedEnvironments = ['prod-us-east-1', 'prod-us-west-2', 'prod-eu-west-1', 'staging-us-east-1']
    if (!params.TARGET_ENVIRONMENT?.trim()) {
        errors.add("TARGET_ENVIRONMENT is required")
    } else if (!allowedEnvironments.contains(params.TARGET_ENVIRONMENT)) {
        errors.add("TARGET_ENVIRONMENT must be one of: ${allowedEnvironments.join(', ')}")
    }

    // Validate ARTIFACT_FILENAME - strict allowlist of characters
    if (!params.ARTIFACT_FILENAME?.trim()) {
        errors.add("ARTIFACT_FILENAME is required")
    } else if (!(params.ARTIFACT_FILENAME ==~ /^[a-zA-Z0-9][a-zA-Z0-9._-]{0,254}$/)) {
        errors.add("ARTIFACT_FILENAME must contain only alphanumeric characters, dots, hyphens, and underscores, start with alphanumeric, and be max 255 chars")
    } else if (params.ARTIFACT_FILENAME.contains('..')) {
        errors.add("ARTIFACT_FILENAME must not contain path traversal sequences")
    }

    // Validate ARTIFACT_SOURCE is in the allowed choices
    def allowedSources = ['s3', 'artifactory', 'https']
    if (!allowedSources.contains(params.ARTIFACT_SOURCE)) {
        errors.add("ARTIFACT_SOURCE must be one of: ${allowedSources.join(', ')}")
    }

    if (errors) {
        error("Parameter validation failed:\n${errors.collect { "  - ${it}" }.join('\n')}")
    }

    echo "All parameters validated successfully"
}

def validateArtifactUrl(String url, String sourceType, List errors) {
    // Define allowed domain patterns per source type
    def allowedDomains = [
        's3'          : [~/^https:\/\/[a-zA-Z0-9.-]+\.s3\.[a-zA-Z0-9-]+\.amazonaws\.com\/.*$/,
                         ~/^s3:\/\/[a-zA-Z0-9._-]+\/.*$/],
        'artifactory' : [~/^https:\/\/artifactory\.mycompany\.com\/artifactory\/.*$/,
                         ~/^https:\/\/mycompany\.jfrog\.io\/artifactory\/.*$/],
        'https'       : [~/^https:\/\/releases\.mycompany\.com\/.*$/,
                         ~/^https:\/\/build-artifacts\.mycompany\.internal\/.*$/]
    ]

    def patterns = allowedDomains[sourceType]
    if (!patterns) {
        errors.add("No allowed domains configured for source type: ${sourceType}")
        return
    }

    def urlMatches = patterns.any { pattern -> url ==~ pattern }
    if (!urlMatches) {
        errors.add("ARTIFACT_URL does not match any allowed domain pattern for source '${sourceType}'. URL must match one of the configured allowlisted domains.")
    }

    // Reject URLs with suspicious characters that could enable injection
    if (url.contains('`') || url.contains('$(') || url.contains(';') || url.contains('|') || url.contains('&') || url.contains('\n') || url.contains('\r')) {
        errors.add("ARTIFACT_URL contains disallowed characters")
    }

    // Reject URLs with encoded path traversal
    if (url.contains('..') || url.contains('%2e%2e') || url.contains('%2E%2E')) {
        errors.add("ARTIFACT_URL must not contain path traversal sequences")
    }

    // Ensure HTTPS is used (except for s3:// protocol)
    if (sourceType != 's3' && !url.startsWith('https://')) {
        errors.add("ARTIFACT_URL must use HTTPS protocol")
    }
    if (sourceType == 's3' && !url.startsWith('https://') && !url.startsWith('s3://')) {
        errors.add("S3 ARTIFACT_URL must use https:// or s3:// protocol")
    }
}

def sanitizeFilename(String filename) {
    // Remove any path separators and ensure the filename is safe
    def sanitized = filename.replaceAll(/[^a-zA-Z0-9._-]/, '')

    // Prevent path traversal
    sanitized = sanitized.replaceAll(/\.\./, '')

    // Ensure it doesn't start with a dot (hidden file) or hyphen
    if (sanitized.startsWith('.') || sanitized.startsWith('-')) {
        sanitized = "artifact_${sanitized}"
    }

    if (!sanitized) {
        error("Filename sanitization resulted in empty string")
    }

    return sanitized
}

// ============================================================
// Download Functions
// ============================================================

def downloadFromS3(String url, String destPath) {
    echo "Downloading artifact from S3..."

    // Use withCredentials to avoid exposing AWS credentials
    withCredentials([[$class: 'AmazonWebServicesCredentialsBinding',
                      credentialsId: 'aws-deploy-credentials',
                      accessKeyVariable: 'AWS_ACCESS_KEY_ID',
                      secretKeyVariable: 'AWS_SECRET_ACCESS_KEY']]) {
        // Convert https S3 URL to s3:// format if needed for aws cli
        def s3Url = url
        if (url.startsWith('https://')) {
            // Extract bucket and key from https URL
            def matcher = url =~ /^https:\/\/([a-zA-Z0-9._-]+)\.s3\.[a-zA-Z0-9-]+\.amazonaws\.com\/(.+)$/
            if (matcher.matches()) {
                def bucket = matcher[0][1]
                def key = matcher[0][2]
                s3Url = "s3://${bucket}/${key}"
            } else {
                error("Unable to parse S3 URL format")
            }
        }

        // Use aws s3 cp with server-side encryption verification
        sh """
            aws s3 cp "${s3Url}" "${destPath}" \
                --no-progress \
                --region us-east-1 \
                --sse AES256
        """
    }

    verifyFileExists(destPath)
}

def downloadFromArtifactory(String url, String destPath) {
    echo "Downloading artifact from Artifactory..."

    // Use withCredentials to securely handle the Artifactory token
    withCredentials([usernamePassword(credentialsId: 'artifactory-deploy-token',
                                       usernameVariable: 'ARTIFACTORY_USER',
                                       passwordVariable: 'ARTIFACTORY_TOKEN')]) {
        // Use curl with secure options
        def exitCode = sh(
            script: """
                curl --fail --silent --show-error \
                    --location \
                    --max-time 600 \
                    --max-filesize 2147483648 \
                    --retry 3 \
                    --retry-delay 5 \
                    --proto '=https' \
                    --tlsv1.2 \
                    --user "\${ARTIFACTORY_USER}:\${ARTIFACTORY_TOKEN}" \
                    --output "${destPath}" \
                    "${url}"
            """,
            returnStatus: true
        )

        if (exitCode != 0) {
            error("Failed to download artifact from Artifactory (exit code: ${exitCode})")
        }
    }

    verifyFileExists(destPath)
}

def downloadFromHttps(String url, String destPath) {
    echo "Downloading artifact from HTTPS endpoint..."

    // Download using curl with strict TLS and security options
    def exitCode = sh(
        script: """
            curl --fail --silent --show-error \
                --location \
                --max-time 600 \
                --max-filesize 2147483648 \
                --max-redirs 3 \
                --retry 3 \
                --retry-delay 5 \
                --proto '=https' \
                --tlsv1.2 \
                --output "${destPath}" \
                "${url}"
        """,
        returnStatus: true
    )

    if (exitCode != 0) {
        error("Failed to download artifact from HTTPS endpoint (exit code: ${exitCode})")
    }

    verifyFileExists(destPath)
}

def verifyFileExists(String filePath) {
    def exists = sh(script: "test -f '${filePath}' && echo 'true' || echo 'false'", returnStdout: true).trim()
    if (exists != 'true') {
        error("Downloaded artifact not found at expected path: ${filePath}")
    }

    def fileSize = sh(script: "stat -c%s '${filePath}'", returnStdout: true).trim()
    if (fileSize == '0') {
        error("Downloaded artifact is empty (0 bytes)")
    }

    echo "Artifact downloaded successfully (${fileSize} bytes)"
}

// ============================================================
// Integrity Verification
// ============================================================

def verifyChecksum(String filePath, String expectedChecksum) {
    echo "Verifying artifact integrity with SHA-256 checksum..."

    def actualChecksum = sh(
        script: "sha256sum '${filePath}' | awk '{print \$1}'",
        returnStdout: true
    ).trim().toLowerCase()

    def expected = expectedChecksum.trim().toLowerCase()

    if (actualChecksum != expected) {
        error("""
            SECURITY ALERT: Artifact checksum verification FAILED!
            Expected: ${expected}
            Actual:   ${actualChecksum}
            The artifact may have been tampered with. Aborting deployment.
        """.stripIndent())
    }

    echo "Checksum verification passed: ${actualChecksum}"
}

// ============================================================
// Deployment Functions
// ============================================================

def resolveTargetServers(String environment) {
    // Resolve target servers from a secure, hardcoded mapping
    // In production, this could come from a service discovery system or secure config
    def serverMap = [
        'prod-us-east-1'    : ['prod-app-01.us-east-1.internal', 'prod-app-02.us-east-1.internal'],
        'prod-us-west-2'    : ['prod-app-01.us-west-2.internal', 'prod-app-02.us-west-2.internal'],
        'prod-eu-west-1'    : ['prod-app-01.eu-west-1.internal', 'prod-app-02.eu-west-1.internal'],
        'staging-us-east-1' : ['staging-app-01.us-east-1.internal']
    ]

    def servers = serverMap[environment]
    if (!servers) {
        error("No servers configured for environment: ${environment}")
    }

    echo "Resolved ${servers.size()} target server(s) for environment: ${environment}"
    return servers
}

def deployArtifact(String artifactPath, List<String> targetServers) {
    echo "Deploying artifact to ${targetServers.size()} server(s)..."

    def deployUser = 'deploy'
    def deployDir = '/opt/app/releases'
    def sanitizedFilename = sh(script: "basename '${artifactPath}'", returnStdout: true).trim()

    // Deploy to each server sequentially with rollback capability
    def deployedServers = []

    try {
        for (server in targetServers) {
            // Validate server hostname matches expected pattern
            if (!(server ==~ /^[a-zA-Z0-9.-]+\.internal$/)) {
                error("Invalid server hostname format: ${server}")
            }

            echo "Deploying to ${server}..."

            withCredentials([sshUserPrivateKey(credentialsId: 'production-deploy-ssh-key',
                                                keyFileVariable: 'SSH_KEY_FILE',
                                                usernameVariable: 'SSH_USER')]) {
                // Transfer artifact securely via SCP
                def scpExit = sh(
                    script: """
                        scp -o StrictHostKeyChecking=yes \
                            -o UserKnownHostsFile=/etc/ssh/known_hosts \
                            -o BatchMode=yes \
                            -o ConnectTimeout=30 \
                            -i "\${SSH_KEY_FILE}" \
                            "${artifactPath}" \
                            "\${SSH_USER}@${server}:${deployDir}/${sanitizedFilename}"
                    """,
                    returnStatus: true
                )

                if (scpExit != 0) {
                    error("Failed to transfer artifact to ${server}")
                }

                // Execute deployment script on remote server
                def deployExit = sh(
                    script: """
                        ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=yes \
                            -o UserKnownHostsFile=/etc/ssh/known_hosts \
                            -o BatchMode=yes \
                            -o ConnectTimeout=30 \
                            -i "\${SSH_KEY_FILE}" \
                            "\${SSH_USER}@${server}" \
                            "sudo /opt/app/bin/deploy.sh '${deployDir}/${sanitizedFilename}'"
                    """,
                    returnStatus: true
                )

                if (deployExit != 0) {
                    error("Deployment script failed on ${server}")
                }
            }

            deployedServers.add(server)
            echo "Successfully deployed to ${server}"
        }
    } catch (Exception e) {
        echo "ERROR: Deployment failed. Initiating rollback on deployed servers..."
        rollbackDeployment(deployedServers)
        throw e
    }

    echo "Artifact deployed successfully to all ${targetServers.size()} server(s)"
}

def rollbackDeployment(List<String> servers) {
    if (!servers) {
        echo "No servers to rollback"
        return
    }

    echo "Rolling back deployment on ${servers.size()} server(s)..."

    for (server in servers) {
        try {
            withCredentials([sshUserPrivateKey(credentialsId: 'production-deploy-ssh-key',
                                                keyFileVariable: 'SSH_KEY_FILE',
                                                usernameVariable: 'SSH_USER')]) {
                sh """
                    ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=yes \
                        -o UserKnownHostsFile=/etc/ssh/known_hosts \
                        -o BatchMode=yes \
                        -o ConnectTimeout=30 \
                        -i "\${SSH_KEY_FILE}" \
                        "\${SSH_USER}@${server}" \
                        "sudo /opt/app/bin/rollback.sh"
                """
            }
            echo "Rollback completed on ${server}"
        } catch (Exception rollbackError) {
            echo "WARNING: Rollback failed on ${server}: ${rollbackError.message}"
        }
    }
}

// ============================================================
// Deployment Verification
// ============================================================

def verifyDeployment(List<String> targetServers) {
    echo "Verifying deployment on ${targetServers.size()} server(s)..."

    def failedServers = []

    for (server in targetServers) {
        try {
            withCredentials([sshUserPrivateKey(credentialsId: 'production-deploy-ssh-key',
                                                keyFileVariable: 'SSH_KEY_FILE',
                                                usernameVariable: 'SSH_USER')]) {
                def healthCheck = sh(
                    script: """
                        ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=yes \
                            -o UserKnownHostsFile=/etc/ssh/known_hosts \
                            -o BatchMode=yes \
                            -o ConnectTimeout=30 \
                            -i "\${SSH_KEY_FILE}" \
                            "\${SSH_USER}@${server}" \
                            "sudo /opt/app/bin/healthcheck.sh"
                    """,
                    returnStatus: true
                )

                if (healthCheck != 0) {
                    failedServers.add(server)
                    echo "WARNING: Health check failed on ${server}"
                } else {
                    echo "Health check passed on ${server}"
                }
            }
        } catch (Exception e) {
            failedServers.add(server)
            echo "WARNING: Could not verify deployment on ${server}: ${e.message}"
        }
    }

    if (failedServers) {
        error("Deployment verification failed on ${failedServers.size()} server(s): ${failedServers.join(', ')}")
    }

    echo "Deployment verification passed on all servers"
}
